top_signals.title: Dutch police trace Odido telco cyberattack to suspected local accomplice
top_signals.summary: Dutch police said Thursday they had uncovered evidence suggesting that Dutch criminals were involved in the cyberattack on telecom provider Odido that exposed the personal data of more than 6 million customers earlier this year.
